nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Creates a booking via Cal.com API (preferred) or Calendly fallback. Inserts to bookings, sends confirmation via lead's preferred channel (B4 router), notifies client via dashboard alert + email (lead-meeting-booked.html template). Triggered by AI Agent action_executor (C2) or directly via lead landing page CTA.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ start: $('Validate').item.json.requested_time, eventTypeId: parseInt($env.CALCOM_DEFAULT_EVENT_TYPE_ID || '0'), attendee: { name: ($input.item.json[0] && $input.item.json[0].full_name) || 'Lead', email: ($input.item.json[0] && $input.item.json[0].email) || 'unknown@example.com', timeZone: 'America/Toronto', language: 'en' }, metadata: { lead_id: $('Validate').item.json.lead_id, client_id: $('Validate').item.json.client_id, source: 'crystallux_ai_agent' } }) }}

nodes.name: Cal.com Create Booking
nodes.notes: Cal.com v2 API. Mary configures CALCOM_API_KEY + CALCOM_DEFAULT_EVENT_TYPE_ID env vars. The eventTypeId is the Cal.com event type the booking goes against (e.g. '15-min discovery call'). Per-client overrides could be added via clients.calcom_event_type_id column in a future migration.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: $('Build Insert').item.json.lead_email, vars: { first_name: $('Build Insert').item.json.lead_first_name, scheduled_at: $('Build Insert').item.json.insert_row.scheduled_at, meeting_link: $('Build Insert').item.json.insert_row.meeting_link } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, booking_id: ($('Insert Booking').item.json && ($('Insert Booking').item.json[0] || $('Insert Booking').item.json).id) || null }) }}
